markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on conversion strategy, content focus, and upcoming website changes.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New CTA Strategy:** Test "Option 1" (demo-focused) as the new sticky blog CTA. This aligns with the team's current work on a new demo video and targets higher-intent, bottom-of-funnel traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [**Content Pivot:** Prioritize "Tools" pages over "Glossary" content. Tools pages generate higher-intent traffic (3-15% conversion vs. \~0.25% for Glossary) and are now outperforming blog views.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [**Lead Magnet Development:** Create downloadable assets (e.g., checklists) to support email nurture campaigns. This will provide a more effective conversion path than linking to generic blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [**Website Rehaul:** A major rebrand will consolidate the site, eliminating the French version and hundreds of low-traffic feature pages. GrowthX will manage redirects to preserve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)

## Topics

### Website Rehaul & Strategy Pivot

  - [**Rebrand & Site Consolidation:** A full rebrand will consolidate the site into a "lean and mean" structure to improve user experience and focus on key product narratives.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2179.0)
      - [The French version of the site will be eliminated and redirected to the English site.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2219.0)
      - [Hundreds of low-traffic feature pages will be removed.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2268.0)
  - [**New Site Structure:** The site will be simplified to:](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
      - [Homepage](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
      - [Product (Request Management, Workflows, Agents)](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
      - [Integrations](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
      - [Customer Stories](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
      - [Pricing](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
      - [Resources](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Pivot:** The content focus is shifting to align with business goals and user behavior.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Deprioritize:** "Glossary" content → generates low-intent traffic with poor conversion (\~0.25%).](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [**Prioritize:** "Tools" & "Alternatives" pages → generate high-intent traffic (3-15% conversion) and are now outperforming blog views.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Refinement:** Focus Tools content on direct competitors (HR help desk, ITSM) to ensure traffic is within the ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)

### Conversion & Lead Magnet Strategy

  - [**New Sticky Blog CTAs:** Jakub proposed three CTA options to increase blog conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [**Option 1 (Demo-Focused):** Aligns with the team's current work on a new 2-minute demo video.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [**Option 2 (Pain Point):** Uses "AgentForce" and "Slack" as examples, but requires copy rework as they are specific brands.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
      - [**Option 3 (Legacy Comparison):** Requires a new, tool-agnostic landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [**Decision:** Proceed with **Option 1** for faster implementation, pending copy review and the new demo video.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [**Lead Magnet Development:** Carmel is creating email nurture campaigns but lacks downloadable assets (e.g., checklists) to drive conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [**Goal:** Repurpose popular blog content into targeted assets that support specific campaign themes (e.g., password resets).](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
      - [**ROI Calculator:** A potential high-value asset. Jakub will research low-code tools to simplify its creation.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)

### Data & Analytics

  - [**Data Accuracy:** The current PostHog setup for tracking blog CTA clicks is inaccurate, showing only 8 clicks for a page with over 100 organic clicks (per Search Console).](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [**Tooling:** GrowthX uses **Scrunch** for AI visibility reporting, a tool that tracks competitive presence and topic visibility across AI models (ChatGPT, Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
      - [The team will begin reporting on Scrunch data and review its setup to ensure it aligns with current content clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carmel:**](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2457.0)
      - [Review and refine copy for the new "Option 1" blog CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2467.0)
      - [Send the list of feature page URLs to Jakub for traffic analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)
      - [Export and share top-viewed "Tools" pages data.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2317.0)
      - [Analyze traffic on feature pages to plan redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)
      - [Find and share info on low-code tools for building an ROI calculator.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
      - [Begin reporting on Scrunch data and review its setup.](https://fathom.video/share/bvCkoWxe52Me7unBgVvjy4n1MioHk87G?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
